purpose: Machine-readable completion audit for the OPL DomainProgressTransitionRuntime and MAS PaperProgressPolicyAdapter target chain.
machine_boundary: This audit records completion evidence and open tails only. It does not create OPL commands, events, outbox items, StageRun identity, provider attempts, MAS owner receipts, typed blockers, human gates, route-back evidence, paper deltas, publication verdicts, artifact mutations, current package freshness, production readiness, or live paper progress.

overall.current_summary: OPL runtime slice, MAS policy adapter consumption, replay expansion, projection demotion, live-readback-only admission boundary, live readback transaction-consistency fail-closed validation, terminal closeout currentness, provider-hosted stale admission recovery, terminal handoff fixed-point projection rebuild, consumed terminal-blocker precedence over owner-receipt handoff surfaces, and MAS runtime-health local event append retirement have landed. The MAS-facing OPL DomainProgressTransitionRuntime ABI is now single-sourced in contracts/opl_domain_progress_transition_runtime_contract.json and src/med_autoscience/controllers/opl_domain_progress_transition_contract.py, and request projection, MAS policy adapter, provider-admission boundary, and live-readback validator consume that shape. The OPL live-readback transaction-consistency ABI is also single-sourced in the same contract/helper and the MAS readback validator consumes the helper-defined identity, causality, latest-transaction refs, and required command/event/outbox flags. The full equivalence target is still open because live DHD apply exactly-one outcome, OPL outbox/StageRun live readback, live DM002/DM003 provider-admission/running proof, and DM002/DM003 fresh paper-line outcome are not closed. paper_recovery_state now treats request-only current_work_unit/provider-admission projections as diagnostic until a complete OPL live readback is present; terminal typed-blocker handoff consumption rebuilds paper_recovery_state and current_executable_owner_action so stale successor actions cannot survive the same refresh; current_execution_surfaces now consume same-identity terminal typed blockers even when the handoff current_work_unit still projects owner_receipt_recorded; OPL current-control terminal closeout consumption no longer lets identity-bound admissions fall back to weak action/work-unit/fingerprint matching; MAS OPL transition readback consumer rejects thin StageRun identity, stale event/outbox/transaction refs, and provider-admission live readbacks whose study/work-unit/fingerprint/route/attempt/request identity does not match the current transition; and MAS provider-admission arbiter pending decisions now expose a non-authoritative opl_transition_event_consumption proof derived from the same provider-bound live readback instead of retaining empty-evidence pending decisions. Legacy default-executor latest wire fallback is now explicit-history-only: current provider admission, current provider handoff export, and current clean-migration recovery readers require canonical owner_callable_adapter_receipts/latest.json and do not consume default_executor_execution/latest.json. Request-task alias retirement now removes the top-level materializer request_tasks field entirely; legacy request task refs survive only under legacy_request_task_diagnostics.legacy_request_task_refs as body-free diagnostic refs. Recovery successor consumption is now fingerprint-bound, so stale repair_progress_projection cannot consume a newer paper_recovery_state successor during fixed-point projection refresh. Domain-owner dispatch latest payload reads are now canonical-only by default; legacy default_executor_execution/latest.json can only be merged with explicit history/provenance opt-in and remains non-authority. Runtime lifecycle payload retention and runtime storage maintenance are now OPL-authorized maintenance callable adapters with fail-closed apply gates and repo-wide no-authority audit coverage; those repo-side guards do not claim OPL live takeover, physical delete, runtime readiness, or paper progress.

hundred_percent_requires: fresh executable evidence for the requirement scope
same identity runtime readback when runtime authority is claimed
owner receipt, stable typed blocker, human gate, route-back evidence, or paper/gate/artifact semantic delta when paper progress is claimed

domain_owner_action_dispatch now consumes the same helper-defined DomainProgressTransitionRuntime provider-admission identity binding as provider admission; readbacks missing explicit route_identity_key or attempt_idempotency_key fail closed as missing OPL authorization.

Legacy default_executor_execution/latest.json fallback is no longer consumed by current provider admission, provider handoff export, or clean-migration recovery readers; legacy latest requires explicit history/replay opt-in.

domain_authority_refs_index active callers now route through opl_state_index_source_adapter and emit OPL StateIndex source-adapter proofs by default; db_path no longer implies MAS SQLite persistence, active callers do not receive a persist_sqlite parameter, and legacy SQLite writes require explicit opt-in for replay/local inspection.

domain_action_request_materializer no longer emits top-level request_tasks; request task refs are nested under legacy_request_task_diagnostics.legacy_request_task_refs with diagnostic_ref_only/body_authority=false and tests assert the alias is absent.

runtime_lifecycle_payload_retention apply and sqlite sidecar repair now require OPL runtime lifecycle maintenance authorization proof bound to operation, maintenance surface, db_path, authorized outcome, and authorization_ref; missing proof returns stable typed blocker shape and does not mutate SQLite/cold objects/sidecars.

runtime_storage_maintenance workspace apply and direct quest physical apply now require bound opl_runtime_storage_maintenance_authorization proof; dry-run, restore-proof canary, refs-only index-only, and planned retention/capsule projections remain non-authority.

runtime_surface_retirement_no_authority_audit derives repo-wide no-authority status from the retirement inventory and classifies runtime lifecycle/storage maintenance as OPL-authorized adapters, not MAS private runtime authority.
feature_audit.open_gap: Remaining live dispatcher soak/no-active-caller proof, DHD obligation actuator physical retirement, domain_authority_refs_index live OPL StateIndexKernel takeover or no-active-replay/local-inspection-caller physical delete proof, OPL cleanup/retention policy live takeover for runtime lifecycle payload retention, OPL storage policy live takeover for runtime_storage_maintenance, and full legacy carrier physical delete evidence still require closeout; request_tasks alias retirement plus runtime_lifecycle/runtime_storage apply gating are repo-level authority-boundary cleanup, not OPL live takeover or physical retirement of every legacy carrier.

phase_audit.open_gap: Remaining private runtime residue still needs live OPL takeover/no-active-caller/tombstone evidence for physical deletion; storage maintenance is now an OPL-authorized MAS callable adapter, not a MAS-owned runtime storage shell.

required_before_goal_complete.required_evidence: Fresh DHD apply, when explicitly delegated, must produce exactly one accepted live outcome family rather than projection refresh, observe_only, or dry-run evidence.
Same-transition OPL command/event/outbox readback must include event_id, outbox_item_id, stage_run_identity, causality, authority boundary, and projection metadata.
Provider admission must consume OPL transition event/outbox/StageRun identity and reject MAS projection residue or MAS self-signed admission.
required_before_goal_complete.repo_side_evidence: Repo-side provider-admission arbiter now consumes provider-bound OPL live readback into explicit opl_transition_event_consumption proof and rejects bare event/outbox/StageRun fragments; live DM002/DM003 OPL transition event/outbox/StageRun consumption remains required.

required_before_goal_complete.required_evidence: DM002 and DM003 must each have fresh live owner receipt, stable typed blocker, human gate, route-back evidence, strict running proof, or paper/gate/artifact semantic delta.

Remaining MAS private runtime-like surfaces must be physically retired, tombstoned, or proven diagnostic/provenance-only with no active authority caller. Current repo evidence proves domain_authority_refs_index active callers are migrated to opl_state_index_source_adapter, emit refs-only OPL StateIndex source-adapter proofs by default, do not persist MAS SQLite unless explicitly opted in through the legacy helper, and cannot authorize runtime/progress; domain_health_diagnostic_obligation_actuator is consume-only with success-proof-gated postconditions, while fail-closed typed blockers are persisted by the explicit mas_domain_typed_blocker_authority_result_adapter and carry a no-OPL-command/event/outbox/StageRun authority boundary instead of actuator-private write authority; domain_owner_action_dispatch is only an OPL-authorized owner callable adapter; runtime_lifecycle_payload_retention apply paths are OPL-authorized maintenance callable adapters and fail closed without bound OPL maintenance authorization proof; runtime_storage_maintenance workspace apply and direct quest physical apply now fail closed without bound opl_runtime_storage_maintenance_authorization proof while dry-run, source-retained restore-proof canary, refs-only index-only, and planned retention/capsule projections remain non-authority. src/med_autoscience/runtime_protocol/runtime_surface_retirement.py#runtime_surface_retirement_no_authority_audit derives this no-authority guard from the inventory and keeps completion_claim_allowed=false. Physical deletion still requires live OPL takeover, no-active-caller or owner-retirement evidence, and tombstone/provenance.
